summary.text:
[0-2] A lime green robot figure transitions from a dark silhouette to full visibility, revealing red eyes, a purple chest emblem, black joints, and silver serrated blades. Green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" is at the bottom left.
[2-10] The figure stands stationary against a white background, holding silver blades. Red eyes, the purple chest emblem, and black joints remain visible. The green website URL text persists unchanged in the bottom left corner under consistent bright lighting.
[10-12] The robot maintains its pose. In the final frame, a faint, translucent ghostly overlay of the figure appears slightly offset behind the main solid form, creating a double-exposure effect against the white background.

[12-16] A lime green robot stands in side profile facing left, right arm extended holding a silver piece. Black structural components cover the back and torso, with a red face mask visible. The text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" appears in green at the bottom left against a white background.
[16-20] Camera zooms in on the lime green legs and black mechanical joints, cropping the head. Silver blade attachments are visible on the legs. The figure then transitions into a translucent, ghostly state, appearing as a faded overlay against the white background.
[20-26] The ghostly overlay disappears, returning the figure to a solid state. The camera pans up to reveal the upper torso and head. The robot faces slightly right, holding silver blades in extended arms. It features red eyes and a maroon chest emblem with a yellow symbol. Black joints connect the limbs. The green text remains fixed in the corner.

[26-34] A lime green robot figure stands statically angled right, holding extended silver blades. It features red eyes, a maroon chest emblem with a yellow symbol, and black mechanical joints. Green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" is fixed at the bottom left. [34-36] The figure transitions into a translucent, ghostly state as the image becomes overexposed and washed out, fading details against the white background. [36-38] The robot returns to full solidity. Finally, a human hand enters from the bottom right, reaching toward the figure's leg.

From 38s, a second hand enters to grasp the lower legs of a lime green robot figure featuring red eyes, a maroon chest emblem, and silver blades. Two hands hold the figure steady facing forward before spreading its legs slightly wider. The hands then rotate the figure to the left, shifting from a frontal stance to a three-quarter view, and finally to a side profile where the right leg bends and lifts. By 52s, the figure is turned to a rear-side profile with knees bent. Throughout the sequence, the green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" remains fixed in the bottom left corner against a plain white background.

The green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" remains visible in the bottom left corner against the white background throughout the sequence.

[94-106] Two hands hold a lime green robot figure by its lower legs, maintaining a forward-facing stance against a plain white background. Initially, the figure's right arm extends forward with a silver blade while the left angles back; subsequently, both arms remain extended outward with silver blades attached. The figure features visible red eyes and a maroon chest emblem. The hands adjust their grip slightly on the green leg pieces but keep the figure steady. The green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" stays fixed in the bottom left corner throughout the sequence.

Two hands manipulate a lime green robot figure featuring red eyes and a maroon chest emblem against a white background, with the green text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" fixed in the bottom left. Initially held by the legs, the figure's arms are extended upward holding silver blades. The arms lower to an outward-angled stance, then raise high again in a flexed pose. The hands shift to grip the robot's arms near the silver blades, transitioning them from a high raised position to an outward extension at shoulder level. Finally, the hands hold the wrists, bending the elbows to raise the silver blades from a horizontal outward position to a vertical stance near the head, maintaining a flexed pose.

From 120s to 124s, two hands grip the lime green robot's wrists, bending elbows to keep silver blades vertical near the head. Between 124s and 126s, the hands rotate the blades from a vertical stance to a forward-facing position. From 126s to 128s, the arms are lowered from a raised position to a horizontal stance with blades pointing forward and outward. Between 128s and 132s, the hands adjust the arms, spreading them outward into a wide horizontal extension. Finally, from 132s to 134s, the right hand moves inward to touch the upper torso near the maroon emblem. The figure displays red eyes and a maroon chest emblem against a white background, with 'Hero-Factory.blogspot.com' text in the bottom left corner.

[2-10] The figure stands stationary against a white background, holding silver blades. Red eyes, the purple chest emblem, and black joints remain visible. The green website URL text persists unchanged in the bottom left corner under consistent bright lighting.
[10-12] The robot maintains its pose. In the final frame, a faint, translucent ghostly overlay of the figure appears slightly offset behind the main solid form, creating a double-exposure effect against the white background.

[12-16] A lime green robot stands in side profile facing left, right arm extended holding a silver piece. Black structural components cover the back and torso, with a red face mask visible. The text "Hero-Factory.blogspot.com" appears in green at the bottom left against a white background.
[16-20] Camera zooms in on the lime green legs and black mechanical joints, cropping the head. Silver blade attachments are visible on the legs. The figure then transitions into a translucent, ghostly state, appearing as a faded overlay against the white background.
[20-26] The ghostly overlay disappears, returning the figure to a solid state. The camera pans up to reveal the upper torso and head. The robot faces slightly right, holding silver blades in extended arms. It features red eyes and a maroon chest emblem with a yellow symbol. Black joints connect the limbs. The green text remains fixed in the corner.
